description: Run pnpm pack to generate the tarball and audit its contents. Verify: only build/, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, package.json are included (no src/, tests/, .automaker/, node_modules/, or config files). Verify build/index.js has the shebang line and is executable (chmod 755). Verify pnpm publish --dry-run completes without error. Run npx wc-mcp from the packed tarball against a test CEM file to confirm the binary works end-to-end. Fix .npmignore or package.json files field if any unwanted files are included.
title: npm pack dry run and tarball audit
